Command.Name: auth
Command.Description: Sign in, inspect identity, and manage API keys

Command.Name: login
Command.Description: Sign in with username and password

Option.Description: Auto-page until all results are fetched
Path to config file (overrides default location)
Emit JSON instead of table output
Profile name on the resolved host
User context for user-scoped commands (id or 'me')

Option.Description: Auto-page until all results are fetched
Path to config file (overrides default location)
Emit JSON instead of table output
Profile name on the resolved host
User context for user-scoped commands (id or 'me')

Command.Name: items

Option.Description: Auto-page until all results are fetched
Path to config file (overrides default location)
Extra fields to return, comma-separated (e.g. Overview,Path,MediaStreams)

Filter by media type (e.g. Video, Audio, Photo)
Parent folder ID to scope the query
Profile name on the resolved host
Search recursively within the parent folder
Sort field (e.g. SortName, DateCreated, PremiereDate, ProductionYear, Random)
Include only item types, comma-separated (e.g. Movie,Series,Episode)

Command.Name: triggers
Command.Description: Show task triggers or replace them with 'tasks triggers set <TASK_ID>'

Argument.Name: TASK_ID_OR_ACTION
Argument.Description: Task ID or key, or 'set' to update triggers

Argument.Name: TASK_ID
Argument.Description: Task ID when using the 'set' action

Option.Description: Auto-page until all results are fetched
Replace all triggers with an empty list
Path to config file (overrides default location)
Load a trigger list from JSON
Emit JSON instead of table output
Apply one max runtime to all flag-built triggers
Profile name on the resolved host
User context for user-scoped commands (id or 'me')
